title: Fuel prices are rising everywhere — but not equally
subtitle: Wholesale gasoline prices by region, index (100 = January 1, 2026)
source: Bloomberg, JP Morgan Asset Management, March 23, 2026
editorialPoint: India's wholesale gasoline price has risen more than Europe's or America's — showing how this crisis disproportionately hits import-dependent Asian economies
note: US prices rising less because domestic production buffers the shock. Asian economies — Japan, India, Singapore — bear the brunt because 80-84% of Hormuz crude is bound for Asia.
